question: Looking at the US median income map, which statement below is the most accurate?

options.A: The median income gap between Washington and Florida might exceeds that between Louisiana and Ohio.
options.B: Washington and Florida have similar median incomes.
options.C: The median income differences are impossible to determine from this visualization.
options.D: All states shown have nearly identical median income levels.

explanation: Washington (72.9$k) and Florida (88.4$k) have a 15.5$k median income difference, while Louisiana (29.7$k) and Ohio (30.2$k) have only a 0.5$k difference. However, the categorical color encoding groups Washington and Florida into the same color bin (60$k+ range), making their large difference appear similar, while Louisiana and Ohio appear more different due to different color bins.
